recalls.Description: StyleCraft is recalling its Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers, model SC607M, due to potential fire and burn hazards caused by overheating lithium-ion batteries. The affected clippers are available in blue, red, and black, with the model and lot numbers printed on the back. The specific lot numbers involved in this recall are 35-22, 40-22, 15-23, 20-23, 25-23, 30-23, 35-23, and 40-23. The front cover features the letters 'SC' and the name 'INSTINCT'.
recalls.Title: StyleCraft Recalls Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should contact StyleCraft at 888-864-6409 from 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at CSteam@stylecraftus.com. More information can be found online at www.stylecraftus.com/recall or by visiting www.stylecraftus.com and clicking on 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 50,000 (In addition, about 1,320 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled StyleCraft Instinct Professional Vector Motor Cordless Hair Clippers (blue)
Recalled StyleCraft Instinct Professional Vector Motor Cordless Hair Clippers (blue)
Model and Lot number location on the recalled clippers

Injuries.Name: StyleCraft has received six reports of the batteries overheating or causing a fire, including one minor burn.

Retailers.Name: Available at professional beauty supply stores nationwide and online at www.stylecraftus.com and www.amazon.com from January 2023 through May 2024 for approximately $250.

Importers.Name: StyleCraft LLC, of Boca Raton, Florida

Hazards.Name: Overheating lithium-ion battery poses fire and burn risks.

Remedies.Name: Stop using and charging the clippers immediately. Follow StyleCraft's instructions for battery removal and obtain a free battery replacement. Batteries can be replaced at authorized service centers or by mailing the unit back to StyleCraft in a pre-paid shipping package. Dispose of the battery according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: StyleCraft recalls Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers due to fire and burn hazards from overheating batteries. Contact for free replacement details.
